title: Update on the Origin Control Table to be Considered in the BILGE System of Turkish Customs
bodyHtml:
As per the changes made in the "Origin Control Table" prepared by the Ministry of Commerce, necessary adjustments have been implemented in the BILGE System. The updated table is planned to be activated as of May 22, 2024. The Origin Control Table contains information regarding preferential tariff application codes and the documents to be searched for corresponding to these codes. The application in the BILGE System operates according to the conditions specified in the origin control table.

Click here for the letter from the General Directorate of Customs regarding the matter.

Click here for the Origin Control Table.
